steps.title: Find the noun and the following modifier
steps.content: The text before the blank ends with the preposition 'across the', which needs a noun to complete its object. The text after the blank begins with the participle 'utilizing', which introduces a participial phrase.

A period ends the first independent clause, allowing the following word to begin a new sentence. The other choices either run the clauses together, misuse a conjunction, or insert only a comma, which creates a run‑on or comma splice. That matches choice D — D is correct.
steps.title: Apply the sentence‑boundary rule
